    Debouncer
    A simple boolean filter that prevents repetitive, noisy triggers.
    Debouncer.DebounceType
     
    InterpolatingTreeMap<K extends Number,V extends Interpolatable<V>>
    A TreeMap that automatically interpolates between values if the exact key is not found.
    KalmanFilter1D
    A lightweight, dependency-free 1-Dimensional Kalman Filter for state tracking.
    LinearFilter
    This class implements a linear, time-invariant filter.

    A class that implements a moving-window median filter.

    A class that limits the rate of change of an input value.
